# EE Lab DSP Utilities

This repository contains some helper code I use for quick filter prototyping and measurement organization in the lab. It's not a full package, but I want to keep it tidy enough to share informally.

## Getting Started
- src/ contains simple Python modules (no external runtime requirements beyond typical scientific stack when actually used).
- input/ contains some drafts and notes that are not part of the library itself.

## Notes
This is a work-in-progress sandbox for lab experiments and demos.
